# Apex Packaging Solutions

Apex Packaging Solutions is a Canadian custom-packaging manufacturer producing corrugated boxes, polybags, industrial bulk packaging, and protective packaging for B2B and industrial buyers across all Canadian provinces. Lead times are 7–14 days from artwork sign-off. MOQs start at 100 units on stock corrugated and 250 units on custom-printed mailers. FSC-certified, recycled-content, and compostable options are available with documentation.

Location: 265 Brunswick Ave, London ON N6G 5P8, CANADA
Website: https://apexpackagingsolutions.com
Email: sales@apexpackagingsolutions.com
Phone: 613-518-8744
Languages served: English, French

## Services

- Custom corrugated boxes — RSC, FOL, die-cut, telescoping. Single-wall ECT-32 to double-wall ECT-44/48. Flexo, digital, and litho-laminated print. MOQ from 100 units.
- Custom mailer boxes — tuck-top, magnetic close, ZIP-tear, dispenser styles. Full-colour exterior and interior print. MOQ from 250 units.
- Custom polybags — LDPE, HDPE, LLDPE, MDPE, PCR blends. Flat, gusseted, wicket, slider, ZIP. 0.5–6.0 mil gauges. Anti-static, FDA-compliant, EN 13432 compostable options. MOQ from 500 units.
- Industrial and bulk packaging — Gaylord boxes, triple-wall corrugated, hand and machine stretch film, shrink film, edge protectors, strapping. Blanket POs and scheduled releases.
- Protective packaging — custom-cut foam inserts (PE, PU, ESD, cross-linked PE), Instapak, bubble wrap, air pillows, paper void fill, VCI rust-prevention paper, desiccants. Specified to ISTA 1A/2A/3A/Amazon-6 drop-test classes.
- Design support — structural dieline plus 3D mockup within 48–72 hours of brand-asset receipt. Free with orders over MOQ; $200–$1,200 flat fee for design-only engagements.

## Industries served

- Automotive parts manufacturers
- Food and beverage producers
- Pharmaceuticals and medical devices
- Electronics and high-tech assembly
- Industrial supply and MRO distribution
- E-commerce and D2C brands

## Differentiators

- 7–14 day production lead time, versus 4–6 weeks industry standard.
- MOQs starting at 100 units (stock corrugated), 250 units (custom-printed mailers), 500 units (custom-print polybags) — vs 1,000–5,000 minimum at most competitors.
- In-house structural design included with orders over MOQ.
- FSC chain-of-custody, ISO 9001, and SQF (on food-contact lines) certifications. Documentation provided as standard, not on-request.
- Domestic Canadian production. No overseas freight, no tariff exposure.

## Areas served

All ten Canadian provinces. National LTL and FTL freight from a Canadian plant. International (U.S., overseas) shipping referred to cross-border partner.

## How to request a quote

Email or use the contact form with: product type and dimensions, packaging type needed, target MOQ, lead time needed, sustainability requirements (FSC / PCR / compostable), brand assets if printed, and existing spec if transferring from another supplier. Response within one business day.

## Frequently asked questions

### What is the minimum order quantity?
MOQs start at 100 units on stock RSC corrugated, 250 units on custom-printed flexo mailers, and 500 units on custom-print polybags. Digital-print runs can go as low as 50 units for sampling.

### What is the typical lead time?
7–14 days from artwork sign-off. Rush service available for 5–7 days at a 20% surcharge.

### Do you ship across all of Canada?
Yes — national LTL and FTL across all ten provinces from a Canadian plant.

### What certifications does Apex hold?
FSC chain-of-custody, ISO 9001, and SQF on food-contact lines. Certifications and PCR-content documentation provided with every order on request.

### Is design support included or extra?
Included with orders over MOQ. Design-only engagements (no production) are billed at a flat fee, typically $200–$1,200 depending on complexity.

### What sustainability options are available?
FSC-certified corrugated, 30–80% PCR-recycled liner, 70–100% recycled fluting, soy-based inks, water-based coatings, PFAS-free food-contact coatings, 30–50% PCR polybag film, and EN 13432 industrial-compostable polybag film. Documentation provided for ESG reporting.

### What box styles does Apex manufacture?
Regular Slotted Carton (RSC), Half-Slotted Carton (HSC), Full Overlap Slotted Carton (FOL), five-panel and cut-out wrap, telescoping (two-piece), die-cut, and custom dielines drawn to spec.

### What polybag types does Apex manufacture?
Flat, gusseted, wicket, coreless, slider, ZIP, pre-opened bags on rolls (POR). Specialty types include anti-static (pink), FDA food-safe, VCI rust-prevention, and EN 13432 compostable.
